title: Refund Policy (v2.0)
content: Refund Policy. Customers may request a refund within 30 days of purchase. Refunds are issued to the original payment method. Digital goods are refundable only if unused. To start a refund, contact support with your order number.

title: Refund Policy (v1.0)
content: Refund Policy. Customers may request a refund within 14 days of purchase. Digital goods are non-refundable. Refunds are issued as store credit only.

title: FAQ: Refunds
content: How long does a refund take under the refund policy? A refund is processed within 5 to 7 business days after approval. Where does my refund go? Back to the original payment method used for the order.

title: Shipping Policy
content: Standard shipping takes 3 to 5 business days. Express shipping is available at checkout. We ship to most countries worldwide.

title: Privacy Policy
content: We collect personal data to fulfill orders. We do not sell your data. You may request deletion of your data at any time.
